title: Plantations and Negro Villages, British Guiana (1860)
description: This PDF indexes plantations and formerly enslaved villages in nineteenth-century British Guiana, organized by plantation name and location. It appears to be a historical reference compilation included in the portal source archive and is useful for historical settlement research, place-name recovery, and archival context.

title: All Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This boundary layer maps Neighbourhood Democratic Councils across Guyana and includes council identifiers, status fields, and regional references. It was distributed in the supplied portal archive and is suited to local government mapping, service-area analysis, and administrative lookup.

title: Amerindian Areas
description: This polygon layer delineates Amerindian areas across Guyana and includes names, regions, grant numbers, and acreage attributes. It was supplied as part of the portal source archive and supports Indigenous land reference, planning analysis, and contextual mapping.

title: Amerindian Villages
description: This spreadsheet lists Amerindian villages with latitude and longitude coordinates. It was included in the source archive as a simple reference table and is useful for geocoding, settlement lookup, and map labeling.

title: Anna Regina Boundary
description: This polygon layer represents the Anna Regina local administrative area. It was packaged with the portal source archive and is useful for town-level boundary display, overlay analysis, and constituency context.

title: Corriverton Constituencies
description: This layer maps constituency polygons for Corriverton. It was distributed in the portal archive and is useful for municipal reference mapping, election context, and neighborhood-level overlays.

title: Gazetteer Places
description: This CSV provides a gazetteer of places in Guyana with district, region, population, and coordinate fields. It appears to be a curated place-name reference table included in the archive and is useful for search, geocoding support, and settlement indexing.

title: GeoName Places
description: This table contains GeoNames-style place records for Guyana, including names, alternate names, coordinates, feature codes, and administrative codes. It is a standard geographic names reference dataset and is useful for search, autocomplete, and place reconciliation workflows.

title: Georgetown Constituencies
description: This boundary layer maps constituency polygons within Georgetown. It was included in the portal source archive and is well suited to urban governance mapping, electoral context, and city-scale web maps.

title: Georgetown Census Districts
description: This polygon layer maps census districts for Georgetown and includes district names and 2012 population attributes. It was supplied in the source archive and supports demographic mapping, urban analysis, and census-based visualization.

title: Guyana's Coastal Villages
description: This raster is a static map of coastal villages in Guyana. It was included in the portal archive as a reference image and is best used for visual orientation, not interactive feature querying.

title: Guyana National Boundary
description: This polygon layer represents the national boundary of Guyana and carries summary population fields for multiple census years. It was packaged in the source archive and is useful for national context maps, overlays, and country-level reporting.

title: Village Household Tables (2012)
description: This collection contains village-level household tables from the 2012 census, covering dwelling conditions, utilities, equipment, crime experience, and environmental concerns. It was delivered as a bundled set of PDFs in the archive and is useful for socioeconomic profiling and local service analysis.

title: Lethem Constituencies
description: This layer maps constituency polygons for Lethem. It was distributed in the portal archive and is useful for municipal boundary display, local planning, and civic reference mapping.

title: Linden Census Districts
description: This polygon layer maps census districts in Linden and includes constituency and 2012 population fields. It was supplied in the source archive and supports demographic mapping, service-area analysis, and town-level census work.

title: List of Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This spreadsheet lists Guyana's Neighbourhood Democratic Councils by region and code, and the sheet itself cites the Bureau of Statistics, Guyana. It is useful as a reference index for boundary layers, administrative joins, and catalog QA.

title: Local Government Areas of Guyana
description: This boundary layer maps local government areas across Guyana and includes identifiers, names, status, region, and acreage fields. It was distributed in the portal source archive and is suited to national-scale administrative mapping, governance analysis, and service planning.

title: Mabaruma Constituencies
description: This layer maps constituency polygons for Mabaruma. It was included in the portal archive and is useful for local governance maps, electoral context, and municipal overlays.

title: Mahdia Boundary
description: This polygon layer represents the Mahdia administrative boundary. It was supplied in the portal archive and is appropriate for town-level reference mapping and planning overlays.

title: Guyanese Exclusive Economic Zone
description: This maritime polygon depicts Guyana's exclusive economic zone and includes marine region identifiers and area fields. It was provided in the source archive and is useful for offshore context mapping, boundary review, and marine planning.

title: Municipality of Bartica
description: This layer maps constituency polygons for the Municipality of Bartica. It was distributed with the portal archive and is useful for municipal reference maps, local planning, and civic boundary context.

title: New Amsterdam Census Districts
description: This polygon layer maps census districts in New Amsterdam and includes district and population fields from 2012. It was included in the source archive and supports urban demographic mapping, census analysis, and local planning work.

title: Population by Census Districts, Georgetown (2012)
description: This spreadsheet reports 2012 population totals by census district for Georgetown. It was included in the source archive and is useful for attribute joins, charting, and validating city-level demographic layers.

title: Village Population Tables (2012)
description: This collection contains village-level 2012 census tables covering population, education, livelihood, disability, religion, internet access, and related characteristics. It was delivered as a bundled set of PDFs in the archive and is useful for socioeconomic profiling and comparative village analysis.

title: Region 1 Reference Map
description: This PNG is a static reference map for Region 1 included in the source archive. It is useful as a quick visual aid in the portal, but it does not provide interactive feature geometry.

title: Region 1 Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 1. It was included in the source archive and is useful for regional governance mapping, administrative lookup, and planning support.

title: Region 2 Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 2. It was distributed in the portal archive and is suited to local government mapping, service-area analysis, and regional overlays.

title: Region 3 Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 3 and includes 2012 population fields. It was supplied in the source archive and is useful for administrative mapping and demographic context at the local government level.

title: Region 4 Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 4 and includes 2012 sex and total population attributes. It was included in the source archive and is useful for regional administration maps, demographic overlays, and planning workflows.

title: Region 5 Villages
description: This polygon layer maps villages in Region 5 with linked constituency, NDC, and regional fields. It was provided in the source archive and is useful for settlement mapping, administrative joins, and community-level analysis.

description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 5 and includes population fields. It was included in the portal archive and is useful for local government mapping, administrative analysis, and demographic context.

description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 6. It was supplied in the source archive and is useful for regional governance mapping, administrative lookup, and service planning.

description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 7 and includes population attributes. It was distributed in the portal archive and is useful for regional administration maps and local demographic context.

title: Region 8 Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 8 and includes village counts and population fields. It was included in the source archive and is useful for regional planning, governance mapping, and community reference.

title: Region 9 Neighbourhood Democratic Councils
description: This boundary layer maps NDC polygons for Region 9. It was supplied in the portal archive and is useful for regional governance mapping, service-area work, and administrative lookup.

title: Region 9 Boundary
description: This polygon layer represents the boundary of Region 9, Upper Takutu-Upper Essequibo, with area and multi-year population fields. It was included in the source archive and is useful for regional context maps, reporting, and demographic overlays.

title: Region 1 Boundary
description: This polygon layer represents the boundary of Region 1, Barima-Waini, with area and multi-year population fields. It was supplied in the source archive and is useful for regional context maps, reporting, and demographic overlays.

title: Rose Hall Constituencies
description: This layer maps constituency polygons for Rose Hall. It was distributed in the portal archive and is useful for municipal boundary display, electoral context, and local planning maps.

title: Silica City Boundary
description: This polygon layer delineates planning blocks for Silica City. It was provided in the source archive and is useful for development planning maps, concept overlays, and project-area reference.

title: The Guyana-Suriname Maritime Boundary Dispute
description: This PDF is a written reference on the Guyana-Suriname maritime boundary dispute. It was included in the source archive as supporting context and is useful for legal, historical, and policy background alongside marine boundary layers.

title: Town of Linden Constituencies
description: This layer maps constituency polygons for the Town of Linden and includes election-related attributes. It was packaged in the source archive and is useful for municipal mapping, civic context, and local analysis.

title: Vintage Town Map, Georgetown (1914)
description: This JPG is a scanned historical town map of Georgetown dated 1914. It serves as archival reference material for historical urban research, map comparison, and heritage storytelling.

title: Guyana Regional Reference Map
description: This JPG is a static regional map of Guyana included in the source archive. It is useful as a simple locator image for portal pages and documentation, but it is not an interactive spatial layer.

title: Guyana Administrative Regions with Population
description: This polygon layer maps Guyana's ten administrative regions and includes population totals for multiple census years. It was supplied in the source archive and is useful for national dashboards, choropleth mapping, and regional comparisons.
